name: Excel Range Relay
short_description: A menu-bar Excel relay for turning the copied sheet selection into clean markdown, CSV, JSON, or prompt context without rebuilding the table by hand.
audience: Mac users who hand spreadsheet slices into prompts or docs
Operators working between Excel, chat, and notes
People who need one clean spreadsheet handoff instead of manual cleanup
detail_lines: Reads the copied Excel selection from the clipboard and preserves the table shape for markdown, CSV, JSON, or prompt-ready output.
Uses lightweight macOS automation only for workbook, sheet, and range labels when Microsoft Excel is frontmost.
Keeps the next step obvious with one preview card and fast copy actions instead of another spreadsheet editor.
